metadata.description: Claude Code marketplace hosting the prd-pr-claude dev-workflow plugin: orchestrator skill drives the full plan-then-build flow with vertical-slice architecture and slice-by-slice implementation, dispatching helper subagents as needed.

plugins.name: prd-pr-claude
plugins.description: Claude Code dev-workflow plugin — orchestrator skill (workshop-dev-workflow) drives the full plan-then-build flow in the main session, dispatching helper subagents (code-explorer, code-architect, plan-reviewer, impl-backend, impl-frontend, impl-simplify) as needed.
